nodes.name: Long-crested myna
nodes.summary: The long-crested myna (Basilornis corythaix) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is endemic to Seram Island. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. References
nodes.shortSummary: The long-crested myna (Basilornis corythaix) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is endemic to Seram Island.

nodes.name: Basilornis
nodes.summary: Basilornis（Basilornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Sulawesi myna、Helmeted myna、Long-crested myna。
